info.title: Ootils Core API
info.description: Ootils Core REST API — supply chain planning engine.

post.description: Submit a planning event that triggers recalculation.

get.description: Return projected inventory buckets for an item/location pair.
Return active shortages filtered by severity and horizon.
Return the causal explanation for a planning node.

post.description: Create a new scenario with overrides and compute the delta vs base.

get.description: Return nodes and edges for the planning graph at (item, location, scenario).

post.description: Upsert a batch of items. Upsert key: external_id.
Upsert a batch of sites/DCs. Upsert key: external_id.
Upsert supply conditions per (supplier × item) pair.
Upsert purchase orders (PurchaseOrderSupply) with ERP external_id tracking.
Upsert forecasts (ForecastDemand) per (item × location × bucket × grain).
Import a complete Bill of Materials for an item. Automatically computes Low-Level Codes (LLC).

get.description: Return the active BOM for an item with its components and LLC.

post.description: Compute gross and net component requirements for a given quantity (multi-level explosion, netting against available stock).
Import non-working days for a location. Upsert per (location × date). Missing entry = working day by default.

get.description: List calendar entries for a location (optional: filter by date range).

post.description: Return the date resulting from adding N working days to a start date, respecting the location calendar.

quantity_per.title: Quantity Per
quantity_per.description: Component quantity per 1 unit of parent (> 0).

is_working_day.title: Is Working Day
is_working_day.description: False = non-working day (holiday, closure). Default = False.

shift_count.title: Shift Count
shift_count.description: Number of shifts on this day [0–3]. Optional.

explosion_date.title: Explosion Date
explosion_date.description: Reference date for explosion. Defaults to today.

time_grain.title: Time Grain
time_grain.description: Time grain. Values: day | week | month.

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If true, validation only — no DB writes.

entries.title: Entries
entries.description: Calendar entries to import (upsert per location × date).

dry_run.title: Dry Run
dry_run.description: If true, validation only — no DB writes.

external_id.title: External Id
external_id.description: Unique business identifier (e.g. ERP SKU). Upsert key.

item_type.title: Item Type
item_type.description: Item type. Values: finished_good | component | raw_material | semi_finished.

uom.title: Uom
uom.description: Base unit of measure (e.g. EA, KG, BOX).

status.title: Status
status.description: Item status. Values: active | obsolete | phase_out.

location_type.title: Location Type
location_type.description: Location type. Values: warehouse | factory | supplier | customer.

parent_external_id.title: Parent External Id
parent_external_id.description: External_id of the parent site (optional, for hierarchies).

lead_time_days.title: Lead Time Days
lead_time_days.description: Standard lead time in calendar days.

add_working_days.title: Add Working Days
add_working_days.description: Number of working days to add (>= 0).
